svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="T0v-dclvbQnAVwx8sHjf" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-579" dy="-165" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="LFLIX Workstream Dependency Map" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="500" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ws1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="WS1 Quality
Tests + CI" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="210" x="80" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ws2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="WS2 Observability
Structured logs + errors" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="210" x="80" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ws3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="WS3 Data Safety
Validation + transactions" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="210" x="80" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ws4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="WS4 Performance
Caching + endpoint budgets" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="230" x="430" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ws5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="WS5 App Architecture
State store + typed API client" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="230" x="430" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ws6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="WS6 Reliability UX
Download recovery + consistent states" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="230" x="430" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ws7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;" value="WS7 Security Hardening
Rate limits + auth protections" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="250" x="820" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ws8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;" value="WS8 Platform Hardening
Mobile/web alignment + release automation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="250" x="820" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ws1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="ws4" value="enables"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="ws1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="ws5" value="enables"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="ws2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="ws4" value="required for"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="ws3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="ws5" value="guards"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="ws3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="ws6" value="stabilizes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="ws4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="ws7" value="feeds"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="ws5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="ws8" value="feeds"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="ws6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;" target="ws8" value="feeds"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
